signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

No breaking announcements confirmed today (April 18, 2026) on inflation shifts, BOK rate changes, or resolutions tied to Iran conflict energy shocks—March CPI release (early April) showed contained pressures despite oil volatility, with BOK holding
